mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (news_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{newsId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, u.username, u.avatar, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.news_id = #{newsId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
select * from comments order by created_at desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
